name: @context-engine/editor-kit
description: The M9 editor component KIT (design 06 section 3, D11), published to package authors alongside @context-engine/editor-tokens (policy: tokens mandatory, kit strongly recommended). e06c1 shipped the FOUNDATION — the closed 12-role hydration widget layer (design 04 section 4 step 4) that makes every C++-modeled panel themed because its widgets are kit widgets. e06c2 adds the twelve AUTHORED component families of design 06 section 3 (buttons, fields, tabs, trees, tables, chips, badges, toasts, empty-states, skeletons, dialogs, tooltips) as framework-free factories returning real DOM, six of them BUILDING ON a role primitive rather than forking it, each shipping its keyboard and ARIA contract. The published entry point is src/index.ts. Consumes the tokens through the e06b theme engine's CSS custom properties and NOTHING else: neither the stylesheets nor the TypeScript may carry a raw colour, font, shape or motion literal, which the webui-kit-tokens-only + webui-kit-source-tokens ctests enforce, and webui-kit-family-coverage holds the published roster against the design's list. Like editor-core and editor-tokens there is NO npm install and NO runtime Node — the sources are typechecked + bundled at BUILD time by the SHA-pinned tsgo + esbuild, and this manifest declares dependencies ONLY so the deny-by-default license gate (tools/check_licenses.py) sees them; it has none by design (the allowlist for the web layer is dockview-core ONLY).
